channel.title: GoCortexIO Snippets
channel.description: Short, actionable Cortex tips, published as they ship.

item.title: [Cortex XDR] Fixture: a second XDR snippet, used to confirm latest-by-module dedup.
item.description:
Fixture: a second XDR snippet, used to confirm latest-by-module dedup.
Body of the second XDR fixture snippet.

item.title: [Cortex XSIAM] Fixture: a snippet with an inline media payload.
item.description:
Fixture: a snippet with an inline media payload.
Body of the media-bearing fixture snippet.

item.title: [Cortex XDR] Fixture: a basic snippet with no media.
item.description:
Fixture: a basic snippet with no media.
Body of the basic fixture snippet.
